ocr_findings.description: Header logo text: image shows stylized '試験にはコレが出る！' where 'コレ' is rendered in a special bold/colored font. OCR output reads 'つし' instead of 'コレ'. This is a logo/stylized-text misread; cosmetic only as the surrounding text is clear.

reviewer_notes: Content page covering system requirements (システム要件定義) and software quality characteristics (品質特性). Table of three requirement definition types is correctly captured. The only finding is the stylized logo 'コレ' misread as 'つし', which is cosmetic and does not affect meaning.
